steps.title: Locate the stated benefit
steps.content: The passage says guided tours and special events at Rocky Ridge Farmhouse help visitors who are not already familiar with Wilder find enjoyment in her works. The correct benefit must match that stated purpose.

steps.title: Reject unsupported benefits
steps.content: A makes a museum comparison the passage never makes. C mentions several important writers, but the passage focuses on Wilder. D invents nearby local-history museums. The answer is B.
